summary: TWO_COLUMN Weierstrass approximation via Bernstein polynomials. LEFT axes with BLUE non-smooth f(x)=|x-0.5|+0.15 sin(6πx) reference + YELLOW B_n(f) via always_redraw sampled at 60 points. ValueTracker n_idx_tr steps through n=2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 200. RIGHT shows live n and sup-error shrinking to 0.
